summary: Successfully tested all 3 new OLAP Assistant features: Query History Panel tracks queries with timestamps and fills input on click, Comparison Mode allows dimension selection and item comparison, PDF Export generates downloadable reports. All existing functionality remains intact.

ui_bugs.issue: Timeout when clicking pie chart option due to overlay interception

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Query History dialog opens when clicking History button
Query History tracks all queries from current session (2 queries tracked)
Query History shows queries with timestamps
Clicking history item fills the input field correctly
Comparison Mode dialog opens when clicking Compare button
Comparison Mode allows selecting dimension (Region/Quarter/Product)
Comparison Mode allows selecting two items to compare
Run Comparison button triggers comparison process
Export dropdown includes PDF Report option
PDF export generates downloadable PDF file (triggers download)
Export dropdown shows all options (CSV, Excel, PDF)
Backend API endpoints all working (7/7 tests passed)
Natural language query processing works correctly
LLM integration provides detailed OLAP analysis
Chart/Table tabs switching works
Analysis results display with proper data visualization
Summary metric cards show correct data
Available Dimensions section displays correctly
Query Assistant panel functions properly
All existing OLAP functionality preserved

success_percentage.new_features: 100% (Query History, Comparison Mode, PDF Export all working)
